title: Strange Behaviour Of A Tesla Homopolar Generator
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
This is generation without relative motion. You should not this is not triboelectrification with the carbon brush rubbing the aluminium disk as I also took the trouble to repeat the experiemnt without the magnets in place and got no reading at all - feel free to replicate that too - you will get what i got - nothing lol
